user_query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 8 includes a full-day Niagara Falls trip with outdoor scenic time, Hornblower boat ride and explicit 'Outdoor nature' highlight — a clear nature/outdoor activity.
Day 6 includes the Toronto Islands ferry plus bike ride and exploration with beaches and gardens and is labeled 'Outdoor nature' — a substantive outdoor nature activity.
Day 1 includes a Harbourfront Stroll described as an easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront with lake views and 'Outdoor fresh air' — a low-effort outdoor option to get outside.
